mapper.select: select id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_path, permission_code, sort_no from sys_menu where status = 1 order by sort_no, id
select menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId} order by menu_id
select count(1) from sys_menu where id = #{menuId} and status = 1
select count(1) from sys_menu where menu_path = '/system/permissions'
select id from sys_menu where menu_path = '/system' order by id limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_menu (id, role_id, menu_id) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{menuId})
